DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT ST. VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION; AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. THE MOTION IS CONTINUED TO JULY 16, 2025, TO GIVE THE PARTIES A CHANCE TO FINALIZE THEIR SETTLEMENT. ON MAY 5, 2025, THE PLAINTIFF FILED A "NOTICE OF LIMITED OPPOSITION" THAT STATES THAT THE PARTIES HAVE REACHED A SETTLEMENT. PARTIES TO APPRISE THE COURT WHETHER THE MOTION SHOULD GO OFF CALENDAR PRIOR TO THE JULY 16, 2025, HEARING. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Continued To Jan-26-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Deposition; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ST. VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Deposition; And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

Off calendar per movant's 5/15/25 notice of withdrawal of motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Notice Of Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Deposition; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Continued To Jul-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ST. VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Plaintiff'S Deposition; And Request For Monetary Sanctions.

The motion is continued to July 16, 2025, to give the parties a chance to finalize their settlement. On May 5, 2025, the plaintiff filed a "notice of limited opposition" that states that the parties have reached a settlement. Parties to apprise the court whether the motion should go off calendar prior to the July 16, 2025, hearing.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Text Ruling

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2024 Set For Trial On Jul-21-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
